title: amaryllis × nervifolia
intro: Amaryllis × nervifolia, also known as the Naked Lady or Amaryllis belladonna var. nervifolia, is a hybrid plant derived from the Amaryllis belladonna species, characterized by its pure white or white with green stripes trumpet-shaped flowers. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a vasodilator, improving blood circulation. The health benefits of Amaryllis × nervifolia include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its ability to help lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Amaryllis × nervifolia is traditionally prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, tinctures, and ointments, although further research is necessary to fully understand its effectiveness in treating various health conditions.
